creator: malcolm.kay@internode.on.net
text:
I have a similar problem with tightvnc/Xvnc amd64.
 In addition the following lines appended to 
 dmesg on attempting to run vncserver:
 
 WARNING pid 6774 (Xvnc): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0106924
 pid 6774 (Xvnc), uid 1203: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
 
 %uname -a
 FreeBSD xi.home 6.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE #0: 
 Fri Jan 12 08:43:30 UTC 2007     
 root@portnoy.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SMP  
 amd64
 
 Regards
 Malcolm Kay
